applies_to: docs-only clarification with no authority or contract change
risk_rules.validation_independence: same agent may implement and validate when red/green evidence is preserved
validation-gate must assess contract, test, and evidence adequacy

applies_to: provider change packet trust or status freshness
risk_rules.validation_independence: independent code/security/architecture review or explicit human approval is required before promotion

mandatory_stop_conditions: changed path falls outside allowed_paths or inside forbidden_paths
required validation, coverage, required-check, review, or lifecycle evidence fails or is missing
acceptance item is absent, unmapped, or closed only through a task, phase, or delivery-slice label
provider packet provenance, current provider-status evidence, explicit consumer-issued authority, evidence freshness, redaction, receipt, or proof boundary is ambiguous

network, credential, repository write, host-isolated command, provider trust-status read, package registry, sandbox payload disclosure, minimal campaign receipt, richer provider attestation, remote branch, or GitHub PR access is required without the exact task-scoped approval
implementation would execute provider-supplied scripts, write the default branch, auto-merge, or disclose raw customer data by default
private runtime or pilot evidence would enter the consumer checkout or public source repository, or a provider/public disclosure is represented as recallable
runtime, provider, dependency, artifact namespace, authority, acceptance, or Factory contract drift occurs without regenerating the active control set
